revision.comment: Creating this namespace detecting meta-template.
Protected Template:User other: This is a meta-template, the moment it is used it becomes high-risk. ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
remove {{pp-template}}

Changed protection level for "[[Template:User other]]": Allowing template editors on some templates with full protection dating back to pre-[[WP:TPROT|TPROT]] times which aren't too often or too sensitively used. ([Edit=Require template editor access]...
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Main talk other#Requested move 18 November 2019 |Template talk:Main talk other]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:User or other|2=Template talk:Main talk other#Requested move 18 November 2019 }}
</noinclude>{{#switch:
  <!--If no or empty "demospace" parameter then detect namespace-->
  {{#if:{{{demospace|}}}
  | {{lc: {{{demospace}}} }}    <!--Use lower case "demospace"-->
  | {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:User}}
    | user
    | other
    }}
  }}
| user = {{{1|}}}
| other
| #default = {{{2|}}}
}}<!--End switch--><noinclude>

{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Removing notice of move discussion
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Main talk other#Requested move 18 November 2019 |Template talk:Main talk other]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:User or other|2=Template talk:Main talk other#Requested move 18 November 2019 }}
</noinclude>{{#switch:
  <!--If no or empty "demospace" parameter then detect namespace-->
  {{#if:{{{demospace|}}}
  | {{lc: {{{demospace}}} }}    <!--Use lower case "demospace"-->
  | {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:User}}
    | user
    | other
    }}
  }}
| user = {{{1|}}}
| other
| #default = {{{2|}}}
}}<!--End switch--><noinclude>

{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Removing notice of move discussion
1 revision imported: trying to get rid of some red links from probably deleted pages
Adding [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:Template" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "Category::" to "Category:"
7 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:User_other]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Refreshing imports]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[CAtegory:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove deleted category User other
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
